evals.prompt: Run the image-consensus skill against the image run directory at ./evals/files/sample-run
evals.expected_output: Three deliverables: consensus-evaluation.txt, provider-comparison-report.md, provider-comparison-report.json with correct provider count and composite scoring
assertions: consensus-evaluation.txt exists and contains no markdown formatting
consensus-evaluation.txt does not claim to have viewed images
provider-comparison-report.md contains a ranking table with all providers
provider-comparison-report.json contains a providers array with scores
scoring method is composite (no quality rankings provided)

evals.prompt: Run the image-consensus skill against the image run directory where one provider's image file is missing from disk
evals.expected_output: Skill handles missing file gracefully with a warning, still evaluates remaining providers
assertions: warning about missing image file is reported
remaining providers are still scored and ranked
reports are generated successfully despite the missing file

evals.prompt: Run the image-consensus skill with user-provided quality rankings: gemini/imagen-4.0-generate-001=1,openai/gpt-image-1=2,minimax/image-01=3
evals.expected_output: Reports use quality-ranked scoring method with quality rank as primary signal
assertions: highest quality-ranked provider has the best score
